title: Flambe Buttery Australian Veggie Shortening Pavlova
description: A festive, molten Australian dish featuring vegetable shortening and a flambe finish. This pavlova is gluten-free-friendly and perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large mixing bowl, cream together the butter and vegetable shortening until light and fluffy.
Gradually add the granulated sugar and brown sugar, beating until smooth.
Beat in the eggs one at a time, making sure each egg is fully incorporated before adding the next.
In a separate bowl, whip the heavy cream until stiff peaks form.
Sift the confectioners' sugar and meringue stabilizer (if using) over the whipped cream and fold until combined.
Spoon the meringue mixture over the pavlova base, spreading it evenly to cover the entire surface.
Place the pavlova under the broiler and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the meringue is golden brown.
Remove the pavlova from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Flamb������e the pavlova by pouring the cognac over the top and igniting it with a match.
Garnish the pavlova with fresh berries, mint leaves, and a sprinkle of confectioners' sugar.
Dust the pavlova with confectioners' sugar just before serving.
